title: Yashvi Mittal
text: Hi! I’m Yashvi Mittal, a Master’s student at Baruch College. This site collects my coursework and mini-projects for STA 9750 (Software Tools for Data Analysis), Fall 2025.

title: Yashvi Mittal
text:
Projects

Mini-Project: The Electoral College — analysis of U.S. presidential and House election data, 1976-2024.
Mini-Project: The Ultimate Playlist — data-driven playlist curation from song characteristics and user-generated playlists.
Individual Project: CUNY Retirement Plan Analysis — Monte Carlo decision support for new CUNY faculty choosing between retirement plans.
